name: Biscuit Sausage Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large skillet, brown the sausage, onion, and bell pepper; drain well.
3. In a large bowl, beat the eggs; stir in the cheese and sausage mixture.
4. Separate the dough into 8 biscuits.
5. Press the biscuits into the bottom of a 13 x 9-inch baking dish.
6. Pour the sausage mixture into the biscuit-lined pan.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until the quiche is set and the crust is deep golden brown.
8. Cool for 5 minutes before serving.
